steps.title: Identify the key transition
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Don Jerónimo “ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.” This direct statement identifies what changed when he became a patron.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: The passage names the change: he stopped writing plays. The other three choices either introduce information not mentioned in the text or contradict the passage. That matches choice B — B is correct.
